name: app-attendance-workspace
description: Aplicacion de asistencia academica con Ionic React, API y MongoDB local.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix back install && npm --prefix app install
scripts.build: npm --prefix back run build && npm --prefix app run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix back run typecheck && npm --prefix app run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --prefix back run lint && npm --prefix app run lint
scripts.format: npm --prefix back run format && npm --prefix app run format
